---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new capability or improvement
title: "[feature] "
labels: ["enhancement", "triage"]
assignees: []
---

## Problem this would solve

<!-- What real-world workflow or use case is currently awkward, missing, or impossible? -->

## Proposed solution

<!-- A clear description of what you would like to happen. Sketches, API examples, or user flow welcome. -->

## Alternatives considered

<!-- Other approaches you considered. Why is this one preferable? -->

## Scope

- [ ] New SBU integration
- [ ] New dataset format or column
- [ ] New GEO surface (Schema.org type, llms.txt section, sitemap entry)
- [ ] New agent skill or workflow
- [ ] Documentation expansion
- [ ] Other (describe)

## Citation impact

- [ ] This adds a new citable surface (would update llms.txt + sitemap + Wikidata)
- [ ] This refines an existing citable surface
- [ ] No external citation impact

## Related

<!-- Link any related issues, PRs, blog posts, or external references. -->
